seoTitle: Cairns City vs Calamvale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cairns City and Calamvale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cairns City vs Calamvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cairns City and Calamvale.
heading: Cairns City vs Calamvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cairns City, Queensland and Calamvale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cairns City has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Calamvale (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cairns City or Calamvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cairns City has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Calamvale scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cairns City scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Calamvale scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cairns City or Calamvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cairns City has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
